en: TO THE CHOIRMASTER. A PSALM OF DAVID. Hear my voice, O God, in my complaint; preserve my life from dread of the enemy.
zh: 神啊！我哀訴的時候，求你垂聽我的聲音； 求你保護我的性命，脫離仇敵的恐嚇。

en: Hide me from the secret plots of the wicked, from the throng of evildoers,
zh: 求你把我隱藏，使我脫離惡人的陰謀， 脫離作孽的人的擾亂。

en: who whet their tongues like swords, who aim bitter words like arrows,
zh: 他們磨快自己的舌頭，如同刀劍； 他們吐出惡毒的言語，好像利箭，

en: shooting from ambush at the blameless, shooting at him suddenly and without fear.
zh: 要在暗地裡射殺完全的人； 他們忽然射殺他，毫不懼怕。

en: They hold fast to their evil purpose; they talk of laying snares secretly, thinking, who can see them?
zh: 他們彼此鼓勵，設下惡計， 商議暗設網羅，說： “誰能看見它們呢？”

en: They search out injustice, saying, "We have accomplished a diligent search." For the inward mind and heart of a man are deep!
zh: 他們圖謀奸惡，說： “我們設計了最精密的陰謀！” 人的意念和心思實在深不可測。

en: But God shoots his arrow at them; they are wounded suddenly.
zh: 但 神要用箭射他們， 他們必忽然受傷。

en: They are brought to ruin, with their own tongues turned against them; all who see them will wag their heads.
zh: 他們各人反被自己的舌頭所害，必然跌倒； 所有看見他們的，都必搖頭。

en: Then all mankind fears; they tell what God has brought about and ponder what he has done.
zh: 眾人都要懼怕， 要傳揚 神的作為， 並且要思想他所作的事。

en: Let the righteous one rejoice in the LORD and take refuge in him! Let all the upright in heart exult!
zh: 願義人因耶和華歡喜，並且投靠他； 願所有心裡正直的人，都因他誇耀。
